# Quickstart: Add Task
<!-- Generated by /speckit.plan                                      -->
<!-- Validation scenarios for feature 001 — Add Task                 -->

---

## Prerequisites

- Node.js 18+
- Expo Go installed on iOS/Android device or simulator
- Maestro CLI installed (`curl -Ls https://get.maestro.mobile.dev | bash`)

## Setup

```bash
# Install dependencies
npm install

# Start Expo dev server
npx expo start
```

Scan the QR code with Expo Go to launch the app on your device.

## Validation Scenarios

### Scenario 1: Add a task (happy path)

Run:
```bash
maestro test e2e/flows/add-task/UC-01-add-task/AC-1-add-valid-task.yaml
```

**Expected**: Task "Buy groceries" appears in the list. Input clears.

**Expected testID contract** (see [data-model.md](data-model.md) and [contracts/ui-contract.md](contracts/ui-contract.md)):
- `task_input` — text input is visible and focused
- `add_button` — tap to submit
- `task_list` — FlatList with task rows
- `task_checkbox` — unchecked checkbox inside the task row

### Scenario 2: Reject empty input

Run:
```bash
maestro test e2e/flows/add-task/UC-01-add-task/AC-2-reject-empty-task.yaml
```

**Expected**: No task appears after tapping add with empty input. Input stays visible.

### Scenario 3: Long title handling

Run:
```bash
maestro test e2e/flows/add-task/UC-01-add-task/AC-3-long-title-handled.yaml
```

**Expected**: Task is created even with a 500-character title. Checkbox is visible.

### Scenario 4: Task survives app restart

Run:
```bash
maestro test e2e/flows/add-task/UC-01-add-task/AC-4-task-survives-restart.yaml
```

**Expected**: Task added before `stopApp` is still visible after `launchApp`.

### Run all flows

```bash
maestro test e2e/suites/add-task.yaml
```

**Expected before implementation**: All 4 flows fail (RED).
**Expected after implementation**: All 4 flows pass (GREEN).

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `specs/001-add-task/spec.md` | Feature specification (all 4 layers) |
| `specs/001-add-task/data-model.md` | TypeScript types and SQL schema |
| `specs/001-add-task/plan.md` | Implementation plan with component tree |
| `specs/001-add-task/contracts/ui-contract.md` | testID-to-element mapping |
